specs.title: cp-000: Studio left-rail title input has no placeholder and always reflects docTitle
cp-001: Studio Write button applies brand styling only when Learn mode is off
cp-002: Studio Learn button applies emerald styling only when Learn mode is on
cp-003: Studio project selector is hidden when the user has zero or one project
cp-004: Studio project selector selected-label fallback text is Select project
cp-005: Studio project-selector dropdown closes on outside mousedown
cp-006: Selecting the already-active project from the project selector is a no-op in the
cp-007: Switching Studio projects clears initialContent to null before the new project d
cp-008: Switching Studio projects also clears document state and resets save status to i
cp-009: Studio navigation item labels are Current Draft My Library and Literature Search
cp-010: Studio references summary header shows References n using total references in th
cp-011: Left-rail empty citation helper reads Use CmdShiftC to add citations
cp-012: Left-rail summary truncates to the first five numbered citations sorted by citat
cp-013: Left-rail View all n references button appears only when referencessize 5
cp-014: Studio AI-credits widget falls back to 0 50000 when usage stats fail to load
cp-015: Write-mode intensity buttons are Focus Collaborate and Accelerate
cp-016: Write-mode intensity descriptions are AI is quiet only responds when you ask AI
cp-017: Learn-mode banner text is Guide Mode I wont write for you Ill teach you how
cp-018: Learn-mode document-type trigger default text is Select document type
cp-019: Learn-mode stage tracker renders only after a guide document type has been selec
cp-020: Learn-mode stage buttons are Understand Plan Outline Draft Revise and Polish
cp-021: Completed Learn-mode stages render a lighter emerald style while the active stag
cp-022: Studio docLoading screen text is Loading document
cp-023: Studio docError screen renders the raw hook error string without extra fallback
cp-024: Studio first chat submit lazily creates a conversation record through createConv
cp-025: New Studio conversation titles are truncated to the first 80 characters of the f
cp-026: Studio always writes the user chat message to the conversation table optimistica
cp-027: Chat POST body sends only role content pairs from the in-memory message list
cp-028: Learn-mode chat adds guideContextdocumentType only when guideDocType is set
cp-029: Learn-mode chat always sends guideContextstage when guideDocType is set
cp-030: Learn-mode chat sends guideContextprojectTitle only when the title is not Untitl
cp-031: Write-mode chat always sends draftContextintensity
cp-032: Write-mode chat sends draftContextprojectTitle only when the title is not Untitl
cp-033: Studio chat API selects getGuideSystemPrompt only when mode learn and both guide
cp-034: Studio chat API falls back to getDefaultGuidePrompt when Learn mode lacks full g
